notes: Non-profit professional organization for automation and control engineering. Joint publisher with IEC of the ISA/IEC 62443 series (OT/ICS cybersecurity). ISA also publishes its own standards (e.g., ISA-95 for enterprise/control integration). Paywalled at isa.org. Note: distinct from ENX's `isa` match_node (which abbreviates 'Information Security Assessment' for VDA-ISA — different sense of the acronym).
